common.tagline: CRM audit, exports and AI analytics
common.themeDark: Pull the chain: turn dark mode on
common.themeLight: Pull the chain: turn light mode on

hero.title: CRM audit, exports and AI sales analytics
hero.subtitle: Connect amoCRM, Kommo or Bitrix24 in 2 minutes. We'll find funnel leaks, reveal manager performance and analyze calls with AI.

audit.title: Audit in 5 minutes
audit.body: We scan your CRM for 50+ common issues: duplicates, abandoned deals, missed tasks.

dashboards.title: 6 ready-made dashboards
dashboards.body: Funnel, sources, managers, calls, messages and overview — pre-configured for your CRM.

export.title: Full data exports
export.body: ZIP with CSV and JSON: deals, contacts, tasks, calls. Nothing is lost when migrating.

ai.title: AI call analysis
ai.body: Conversation scoring by 20 criteria, behavior pattern extraction and client knowledge base.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: One click and we're already reading your CRM in safe read-only mode.

pricing.title: Pay as you go
pricing.subtitle: No subscriptions. Pay only for what you use: each audit, export and AI analysis has a fixed price.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.a1: We never store your passwords. Connection is via official OAuth of your CRM. Tokens are encrypted, data is in an isolated DB schema.
faq.q2: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a2: No. Everything runs in your browser. You see metrics without extensions, scripts or SDKs.
faq.q3: Can I delete all my data?
faq.a3: Yes. One click: request deletion, confirm with email code — we wipe everything in 24 hours.

cta.title: Connect your first CRM in 2 minutes
cta.subtitle: Sign-up is free. First audit starts at $39.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Get access to CODE9 Analytics in 30 seconds
register.agreeTerms: I accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your CODE9 Analytics account

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email — we'll send a reset code
forgotPassword.sent: If the email exists, a reset code has been sent

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the code from email and your new password
resetPassword.emailHint: If the code did not arrive, check the email and send the code again.
resetPassword.resent: If the email exists, a new code has been sent
resetPassword.success: Password updated. Sign in with the new one.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.emailTaken: This email is already in use
errors.codeExpired: Code expired. Request a new one
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts, try again later
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again

dashboard.title: Welcome
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your account and connections
dashboard.step1Body: amoCRM, Kommo or Bitrix24 — one click via OAuth
dashboard.step2Body: We check your CRM for common issues and funnel leaks
dashboard.step3Body: 6 ready dashboards show funnel, sources, managers and calls

connections.title: CRM connections
connections.subtitle: All your connections in one place
connections.emptyBody: Start by connecting amoCRM — it takes 2 minutes

flash.amocrm_bad_referer: amoCRM did not return an account subdomain. Please try again
flash.amocrm_invalid_grant: amoCRM authorization code was rejected. Please try again
flash.amocrm_exchange_failed: Failed to exchange amoCRM code for a token. Please retry
flash.amocrm_credentials_missing: amoCRM did not deliver credentials within the wait window. Please retry — or contact your admin

detail.title: Connection
detail.callEstimateHint: Calls are scenario-based: {low}–{high} tokens per minute for transcription and analysis. No new transcription starts here.

new.title: New connection
new.subtitle: Choose the CRM you want to connect
new.emailDesc: Gmail, Outlook, Yandex or IMAP for client emails and knowledge base
new.singleCrmBody: To keep data separated, this cabinet supports one CRM connection. To use another CRM, delete the current connection or create a separate cabinet.
new.singleCrmHint: Adding another CRM is disabled for this cabinet.
new.singleCrmConflict: This cabinet already has a CRM connection
new.mockNote: MVP uses mock mode; real OAuth ships in V1
new.oauthNote: You will be redirected to amoCRM to approve access. We receive a read-only token and trigger the initial pull.
new.oauthError: Could not start OAuth with amoCRM. Check your connection or try again later.
new.externalButtonHint: Once you click 'Install' in amoCRM, your connection will activate automatically.
new.externalButtonStepHint: Click the amoCRM button below and confirm the installation. We activate the connection automatically once amoCRM fires the webhook.
new.externalButtonLoadError: Failed to load the amoCRM button. Check your connection and try again.

delete.title: Delete data
delete.subtitle: This action is irreversible. We will wipe all data linked to this connection.
delete.warning: This removes all exports, audits, AI analyses and the tenant DB schema. Your billing balance is preserved.
delete.codeSent: Code sent to the owner's email

audit.title: CRM audit
audit.subtitle: We scan your CRM for issues and funnel leaks
audit.empty: Run your first audit to see the report

dashboard_page.title: Dashboards
dashboard_page.noData: No data yet. Run a sync first.
dashboard_page.salesSubtitle: Analytics from the exported amoCRM database
dashboard_page.analyticsPipelineHint: The dashboard calculates one selected pipeline instead of merging all pipelines.
dashboard_page.revenueDynamicsHint: Revenue, deals and won deals by month
dashboard_page.pipelinesRevenueHint: Where deals and money are concentrated
dashboard_page.communicationsBody: Emails, chats, events and calls will be added as a separate Phase 2B export. This dashboard shows only real deals, pipelines, stages and managers from the current database.
dashboard_page.riskHint: Deals that have been open or unchanged for too long
dashboard_page.staleDealsHint: Open deals without updates for more than 30 days
dashboard_page.avgWonCycleHint: Average time from creation to successful close
dashboard_page.openAgeHint: How many deals and how much money sit in each age range
dashboard_page.pipelineHealthHint: Where open and stale deals are concentrated
dashboard_page.managerRiskHint: Managers with the most stale open deals

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: CODE9 plan and billing period selection. Real payments are disabled for now.
subscriptions.plansBody: Discounts apply for 6 or 12 months. Selection buttons are safe placeholders for now.
subscriptions.paymentDisabledBody: This is a safe UI phase. Real charges and plan purchases require a separate GO.
subscriptions.noteBody: Before purchase, the system will show plan, period, amount, included AIC9 tokens, and database update rules.

balancePage.title: Billing dashboard
balancePage.subtitle: AIC9 tokens, export costs, transcription, AI analysis, and charge history.
balancePage.spendDashboardBody: Breakdown from the current token ledger. Real payments and new charge rules are not enabled.
balancePage.importDashboardBody: Summary by active connections. Today's numbers are approximate when backend exposes only the latest total export result.
balancePage.topUpsBody: Packages are shown for calculation. Real top-up is not active yet.
balancePage.topUpDisabledBody: Real payment and charging will be connected after a separate GO.

telegram.title: Telegram connection
telegram.subtitle: One shared CODE9 bot for project statuses, errors, and balance alerts.
telegram.channelToggleBody: The customer chooses Telegram, MAX, or both channels.
telegram.commonBotBody: Open the shared CODE9 bot, press Start, then check the chat and send a test message.
telegram.safeMode: Chat check and test sending are active now. Automatic notifications, webhook, and saved settings are a separate step.

check.notFoundBody: Open CODE9 bot, press Start or send code {code}, then check again.

integrationErrors.title: Integration errors
integrationErrors.body: OAuth, token, amoCRM API, and sync issues.

exportStatus.title: Export status
exportStatus.body: Export start, progress, completion, and errors.

dailyStats.title: Daily stats
dailyStats.body: Short summary for deals, updates, and risks.

lowTokenBalance.title: Low token balance
lowTokenBalance.body: Warning when AIC9 tokens may be insufficient.

trialOrPlanEnding.title: Trial/plan ending
trialOrPlanEnding.body: Reminders before trial or subscription ends.

max.title: MAX connection
max.subtitle: A separate MAX bot for project statuses, errors, and balance warnings.
max.channelToggleBody: The customer chooses MAX, Telegram, or both channels.
max.commonBotBody: Open the MAX bot, subscribe or send it a message. After the separate MAX API step, chat check and test sending will work here.
max.safeMode: This is a safe UI step: the MAX bot is separate from Telegram. Real chat check, webhook, token storage, and message sending need a separate GO.
max.checkDisabledTitle: MAX API is not connected yet
max.testDisabledTitle: MAX test is not sent yet
max.disabledBody: The channel is prepared in the interface. Real sending requires a separate MAX API and token-storage setup.
